name: idempotency-replay
title: Idempotency - concurrent duplicates conflict, completed replays are free
narrative: Phase 1: ten requests race in with the SAME fresh Idempotency-Key - exactly one executes, the rest get 409 (in progress). Phase 2: after the winner completes, twenty more replays with that key all return the stored response - the driver proves the backend was not called again by diffing aegisroute_backend_requests_total. temperature 0.9 keeps the response cache out of the picture, so idempotency alone does the work.
watch: The driver's backend-call delta (phase 2 must be +0) and the 409 count in phase 1.
